rationale: Attacker ATK-001 targeted INV-002 (fp8 rescale subnormal flush). PoC exited nonzero with rel_err=0.552 between the mocked fp8 path and the fp32 reference on a subnormal-heavy K/V pattern, exceeding the 0.5 violation threshold. Executor observed attack_succeeded on the cuda rail. Source citations in report.md map to invariants.json source_lines. Severity=high is consistent with a precision-class bug that silently discards probability mass in the forward path (affects training-loss trajectories and inference determinism) without panicking or crashing.
adjudicator_notes: Golden-case fixture. This verdict is frozen: any downstream change that flips any cross_checks.* to false, or flips the verdict away from confirmed, is a regression in the verification layer -- not a legitimate re-adjudication.
